root_text.sn56.104:1.1: … “Evameva kho, bhikkhave, appakā te sattā ye manussā cutā manussesu paccājāyanti; atha kho eteva bahutarā sattā ye manussā cutā pettivisaye paccājāyanti …pe….

translation_text.sn56.104:0.3: Passing Away as Humans and Reborn as Ghosts
translation_text.sn56.104:1.1: “… the sentient beings who die as humans and are reborn as humans are few, while those who die as humans and are reborn in the ghost realm are many …”
